creator: jarrod@netleader.com.au
text:
On Mon, 23 Feb 2009 11:50:21 -0500, Wesley Shields <wxs@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
> Given that this appears not to be a bug but an intended optional
> configuration, do you approve of the patch proposed in this PR?

I have included a modified patch in the soon-to-be PR for
net-mgmt/nagios-devel which also includes similar tweaks for the status
CGI's.  If all looks and tests well, i'll then merge them into
net-mgmt/nagios.  I expect the former to go out in the next 24 hours and
the latter over the weekend.

Jarrod.
